analysis_commentary: Training ran clean to 900s timer (537 steps). New collapse detector held — first probe at 6 min post-grace, illegalMass 0.95-0.98 stayed below 0.999 threshold, sliding window confirmed no-improvement criterion working. legal_mass climbed 0.005→0.028 (5.4× improvement); last probe legal_mass_sum=0.597. 1 arena, no promotion. Goal (prevent policy collapse) directly addressed.
